Assembly: The assembly ilElaSuba1.hap1.1 is based on 57x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by Project Psyche (https://www.projectpsyche.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Z chromosome identified based BUSCO gene painting with ancestral Merian elements~(https://doi.org/10.1038/s41559-024-02329-4). The exact order and orientation of the contigs on chromosome 20 (6.7 - 7.3 Mbp) and chromosome 24 (1.5 - 2.45 Mbp) is unknown.

Assembly: The assembly ilAgoYeat1.hap2.1 is based on 59x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by Project Psyche (https://www.projectpsyche.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm in Hi-C integrated assembly mode, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, each haplotype assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. This genome has been assembled using PacBio and HiC data and phased. The result is two curated haplotypes. Assembly: The assembly nxOscSpea2.1 is based on PacBio HiFi and Hi-C data derived from pools of individuals generated by the Wellcome Sanger Institute's 959 Nematode Genomes project. The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, contamination removal via blobtoolkit, and scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHifi.

Assembly: The assembly cbNecPumi1.1 is based on 22x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial and chloroplast genomes were assembled using MitoHiFi. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using TreeVal. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size.

Assembly: The assembly icCryAcut1.1 is based on 141x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MBG from PacBio HiFi reads mapping to related genomes. A representative sequence was selected for each from the graph based on read coverage, contig size, and its alignments to the related genomes, then MitoHiFi was run on this sequence for circularisation and annotation with MitoFinder. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using rapid curation. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. Chromosomes X1, X2 and Y were determined by synteny to GCA_958510825.1.
